svg.title: BLDCSystem — breadboard visualiser refused
svg.text: The breadboard visualiser refused this design with:

Multi-board design (top level is a BLDCSystem containing 2 Boards). Multi-board assemblies aren't usefully built on a single breadboard. Render each Board's internal circuit separately, or use the `kicad_sch` hierarchical exporter for the system-level schematic.
See the .kicad_sch (schematic) or .dot (graph) exports for this design.
